summary: Full regression after major UI restructuring across 6 pages and conversion of /api/careers/inquiry to multipart. Backend: 34/34 pytest passing (added 5 new tests for the multipart Career Inquiry endpoint incl. resume upload/download, honeypot silent-drop, validation, invalid extension). Frontend: all 6 public pages load with 200, header + footer intact, ZERO console errors. Contact form + Careers General Inquiry (with CV PDF upload) both submit successfully with visible toast + inline success card. Admin login (admin@peninsula.com.qa / Peninsula@2026) works, dashboard loads, all 7 nav sections (Insights/Jobs/Partners/Memberships/Contact Inbox/Career Inquiries/Job Applications) navigate. Nav dropdowns (About Us -> 4 items, Our Commodities -> 6 items) hover-open and route correctly. Verified TEST_UI_Contact submission ended up in admin Contact Inbox.

ui_bugs.issue: Date column renders as YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '2026-07-15') instead of the required DD/MM/YYYY. The Insights/Jobs list rows correctly use the isoToDMY() helper, but lines 245, 249 and 258 of /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.jsx use isoToDateInput(item.created_at) which returns String(v).slice(0,10) — i.e. the raw ISO YYYY-MM-DD prefix.
ui_bugs.selector: table row 'Date' cell inside admin-nav-contacts / admin-nav-inquiries / admin-nav-applications views

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.jsx, replace isoToDateInput(item.created_at) with isoToDMY(item.created_at) at lines ~245, 249, 258 so Contact/Inquiries/Applications inbox tables show DD/MM/YYYY as required.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: in-memory rate limiter (_rate_log) shared across ALL POST endpoints (contact/inquiry/apply) with limit 8/10min per IP. When running behind a Kubernetes ingress/CDN, request.client.host is often the proxy IP so a shared 8-req window will hit legitimate users. Consider trusting X-Forwarded-For or increasing the window per-endpoint.

server.py: DB_NAME default falls back to 'globalagri_db' but .env sets 'test_database'. Not a bug now but the fallback is misleading; prefer failing fast when env is missing (matches project convention).
server.py admin_update: passes item_id straight into ObjectId(item_id) without try/except — an invalid id string returns a 500 InvalidId instead of 400/404. Small hardening opportunity.
AdminDashboard.jsx: two similar date-format helpers (isoToDMY vs isoToDateInput) coexist and one is used in the wrong place — root cause of the UI bug above; consider consolidating.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_auth.py (updated ADMIN_EMAIL to admin@peninsula.com.qa, added TestCareerInquiryMultipart class with 5 new tests)

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (only date-format cosmetic issue in admin inbox)

seed_data_creation: Pytest creates TEST_-prefixed submissions/applications/inquiries and cleans up CRUD items; a TEST_UI_Contact + TEST_UI_Careers submission is left in DB from the UI test (visible in Contact Inbox).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (public GETs + contact) and /app/backend/tests/test_admin_auth.py (auth, admin CRUD, honeypot, resume upload/download for both /api/jobs/apply and /api/careers/inquiry). Rate limiter is 8 requests/10 min per IP and applies to /api/contact, /api/careers/inquiry, /api/jobs/apply — if you re-run form tests many times in quick succession you may see 429s. Frontend testids to prefer: contact-form-{name,email,subject,message,submit}, career-inquiry-{name,email,message,resume,submit}, admin-login-{email,password,submit}, admin-nav-{insights|jobs|partners|memberships|contacts|inquiries|applications}, nav-{about-us,our-commodities}, dropdown-link-*.
rca of the issue: Admin Contact/Inquiries/Applications inbox date columns use isoToDateInput() (returns ISO YYYY-MM-DD, intended for <input type=date>) instead of the sibling isoToDMY() helper. Fix by swapping the function call at the 3 TableCell lines noted above.
